title: GradientNametags
description: A client-side Fabric mod that lets you apply smooth gradient colors to player name tags using simple commands like /namecolor
body:
![Preview of the mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f5aeb0619765da44231291f68328d3b5fe52ad1.png)**Discord** : notlazy25 
Let me know if you face any problem.
> [📖 **How to Use**]
 
 Use/namecolor <color1> <color2> to apply a gradient to your name  

  /namecolor <color1> <color2> <player_name> to apply it to another player
 
 /uncolorname <player_name> to remove it.

>[💡 **Example**]

Use: /namecolor orange yellow Steve

This will make name start orange and smoothly transition into yellow.


>[✨ **Better Experience**]

For an even better visual experience, use this mod alongside https://modrinth.com/mod/perspectivenametag Better Perspective, allowing you to freely adjust your camera view while enjoying smooth gradient name tags from different angles.

>[⚙️ **Features**]

🌈 Smooth gradient name tags (per-character coloring)

🎨 Supports custom hex colors (RRGGBB)

👤 Apply gradients to yourself or other players

❌ Remove gradients anytime

⚡ Instant client-side rendering (no lag, no sync needed)

🔍 Tab-complete player name suggestions

🧠 Smart color interpolation for clean visuals

>[💬 **Commands**]

/namecolor <color1> <color2> → Apply gradient to yourself

/namecolor <color1> <color2> <player_name> → Apply to another player

/uncolorname <player_name> → Remove gradient

>[⚠️ **Important**]

This mod is client-side only

Works on any server without installation

Only YOU will see the gradient name tags
